style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, arranged in two horizontal zones. The LOWER zone is a dense, teeming field of many tiny uniform tokens, small plants, leaves, worms, and scattered dots suggesting soil microbes, none individually labelled, captioned GROUND-LEVEL PROCESSES. The UPPER zone shows a small panel of three simple aggregate gauges labelled SYSTEM HEALTH, with a single simple observer token reading the panel, captioned META LEVEL. A thin dashed line separates the zones, with a few summary arrows rising from the field to the gauges. A small caption below reads MANAGE THE SYSTEM, NOT THE ORGANISM. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond a simple token.
composed_prompt:
